---
title: "Hi, I'm Bansi Khachar"
---

::::: {.columns style="display: flex; align-items: center; padding-left: 2rem;"}
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/IMG_7286%202-2.jpg){.rounded-circle style="border-radius: 60%; width: 150px; height: 160px; object-fit: cover; object-position: center top;"}
:::

::: {.column width="70%" style="padding-left: 0.25rem;"}
I'm a . I specialize in transforming complex information into clear, engaging, and actionable insights.
:::
:::::

## About Me

I'm a digital marketing analyst who has always been drawn to both the creative and analytical sides of marketing — and I've built my career at the intersection of the two. I believe good marketing should feel human, not just optimized, and that belief shapes how I approach every project I work on. 

I hold a [MS in Digital Marketing and Analytics]{.highlight} from Cal Poly Pomona building on a foundation of a Bachelor's in Business Administration with a major in Marketing from Ahmedabad University in Gujarat, India. 

That journey — across industries, countries, and disciplines — has given me a versatile perspective on how data and storytelling work together. Today, I work with tools like Google Analytics, Power BI, SQL, and BigQuery to uncover what's really happening behind the numbers. Whether it's reducing funnel drop-offs, optimizing ad campaigns, or designing surveys that surface meaningful insights, I bring both rigor and curiosity to the work. I don't just measure performance — I ask why it looks the way it does, and what we can do about it.

## Let's Connect

Always happy to chat about marketing, data, or anything in between.

You can [email me](mailto:bansikhachar@gmail.com) or connect on [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bansikhachar29/).

------------------------------------------------------------------------

*Welcome to my portfolio.*
